title: foeniculum officinale var. dulce
intro: Foeniculum officinale var. dulce, commonly known as sweet fennel, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include carminative, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of sweet fennel include relief from digestive issues such as bloating, gas, and indigestion, as well as its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps and anxiety. Sweet fennel is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be consumed as a spice or used in traditional remedies.
